# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Deno Deploy application that dynamically loads modules based on user configuration. Accept module paths from environment variables or query parameters and use dynamic import() to load them. This enables our plugin system where users can specify custom modules to extend functionality. The app runs on Deno Deploy edge runtime.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { serve } from "https://deno.land/std@0.224.0/http/server.ts";

type AnyFn = (...args: unknown[]) => unknown | Promise<unknown>;

type PluginModule = {
  default?: unknown;
  handle?: AnyFn;
  init?: AnyFn;
  [key: string]: unknown;
};

type LoadedPlugin = {
  specifier: string;
  module: PluginModule;
};

type PluginInvokeResult = {
  specifier: string;
  ok: boolean;
  result?: unknown;
  error?: string;
};

function json(data: unknown, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "application/json; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(JSON.stringify(data, null, 2), { ...init, headers });
}

function text(data: string, init: ResponseInit = {}): Response {
  const headers = new Headers(init.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  return new Response(data, { ...init, headers });
}

function parseList(input: string | null | undefined): string[] {
  if (!input) return [];
  return input
    .split(",")
    .map((s) => s.trim())
    .filter((s) => s.length > 0);
}

function uniq(list: string[]): string[] {
  return [...new Set(list)];
}

function isProbablyUrl(spec: string): boolean {
  try {
    const u = new URL(spec);
    return u.protocol === "http:" || u.protocol === "https:";
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

function toSafeSpecifier(raw: string, baseUrl: URL): string {
  // Allow absolute http(s) URLs. Allow relative paths resolved against current origin.
  if (isProbablyUrl(raw)) return raw;

  // Allow absolute-path style ("/plugins/foo.ts") and relative ("./plugins/foo.ts").
  // Resolve against request origin for stability.
  try {
    const resolved = new URL(raw, baseUrl);
    if (resolved.protocol === "http:" || resolved.protocol === "https:") return resolved.toString();
  } catch {
    // fallthrough
  }

  // As a last resort, return raw (might be importable in some Deploy setups).
  return raw;
}

function getRequestedPluginSpecifiers(reqUrl: URL): string[] {
  const q = reqUrl.searchParams;

  // Query supports:
  //  - ?module=https://... or ?module=/plugins/a.ts (repeatable)
  //  - ?modules=a,b,c
  //  - ?plugin=... (alias)
  const fromQueryRepeated = q.getAll("module").concat(q.getAll("plugin")).filter(Boolean);
  const fromQueryCsv = parseList(q.get("modules"));

  // Environment supports:
  //  - PLUGIN_MODULES="a,b,c"
  //  - PLUGIN_MODULE="a" (single)
  const fromEnvCsv = parseList(Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULES"));
  const fromEnvSingle = parseList(Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_MODULE"));

  return uniq([...fromEnvCsv, ...fromEnvSingle, ...fromQueryRepeated, ...fromQueryCsv]);
}

async function loadPlugins(specifiers: string[], reqUrl: URL): Promise<{ loaded: LoadedPlugin[]; errors: PluginInvokeResult[] }> {
  const loaded: LoadedPlugin[] = [];
  const errors: PluginInvokeResult[] = [];

  for (const raw of specifiers) {
    const specifier = toSafeSpecifier(raw, reqUrl);
    try {
      const mod = (await import(specifier)) as PluginModule;
      loaded.push({ specifier, module: mod });
    } catch (err) {
      errors.push({
        specifier,
        ok: false,
        error: err instanceof Error ? `${err.name}: ${err.message}` : String(err),
      });
    }
  }

  return { loaded, errors };
}

function pickHandler(mod: PluginModule): AnyFn | undefined {
  if (typeof mod.handle === "function") return mod.handle;
  if (typeof mod.default === "function") return mod.default as AnyFn;
  return undefined;
}

async function invokePlugins(
  plugins: LoadedPlugin[],
  req: Request,
): Promise<PluginInvokeResult[]> {
  const results: PluginInvokeResult[] = [];

  for (const p of plugins) {
    try {
      if (typeof p.module.init === "function") {
        await p.module.init({ request: req });
      }

      const handler = pickHandler(p.module);
      if (!handler) {
        results.push({
          specifier: p.specifier,
          ok: true,
          result: { skipped: true, reason: "No handle() or default export function" },
        });
        continue;
      }

      const out = await handler({ request: req });
      results.push({ specifier: p.specifier, ok: true, result: out });
    } catch (err) {
      results.push({
        specifier: p.specifier,
        ok: false,
        error: err instanceof Error ? `${err.name}: ${err.message}` : String(err),
      });
    }
  }

  return results;
}

function allowlistEnabled(): boolean {
  const v = (Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST_ENABLED") ?? "").toLowerCase().trim();
  if (!v) return false;
  return v === "1" || v === "true" || v === "yes" || v === "on";
}

function getAllowlist(): string[] {
  return parseList(Deno.env.get("PLUGIN_ALLOWLIST"));
}

function isAllowed(specifier: string, allowlist: string[], reqUrl: URL): boolean {
  if (!allowlistEnabled()) return true;

  const normalized = toSafeSpecifier(specifier, reqUrl);

  // Simple allowlist matching:
  // - exact match
  // - prefix match when allowlist entry ends with "*"
  for (const entryRaw of allowlist) {
    const entry = toSafeSpecifier(entryRaw, reqUrl);
    if (entry.endsWith("*")) {
      const prefix = entry.slice(0, -1);
      if (normalized.startsWith(prefix)) return true;
    } else {
      if (normalized === entry) return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

serve(async (req: Request) => {
  const url = new URL(req.url);

  if (url.pathname === "/health") return text("ok");

  const requested = getRequestedPluginSpecifiers(url);

  const allowlist = getAllowlist();
  const filtered = requested.filter((s) => isAllowed(s, allowlist, url));

  const denied = requested
    .filter((s) => !filtered.includes(s))
    .map((s) => ({
      specifier: toSafeSpecifier(s, url),
      ok: false,
      error: "Denied by allowlist",
    })) as PluginInvokeResult[];

  const { loaded, errors: loadErrors } = await loadPlugins(filtered, url);
  const invokeResults = await invokePlugins(loaded, req);

  const responsePayload = {
    runtime: "deno-deploy",
    request: {
      method: req.method,
      url: req.url,
      path: url.pathname,
    },
    config: {
      requestedModules: requested.map((s) => toSafeSpecifier(s, url)),
      loadedModules: loaded.map((p) => p.specifier),
      allowlistEnabled: allowlistEnabled(),
      allowlist,
    },
    results: {
      denied,
      loadErrors,
      pluginResults: invokeResults,
    },
  };

  return json(responsePayload, { status: 200 });
});
